sections.title: Executive summary
content_facts: In scope: 3 important business service(s), 2 critical third part(y/ies).
1 impact-tolerance breach(es) observed in period.

sections.title: Important business services
content_facts: IBS-PAY-001 - Retail payments
IBS-ONB-002 - Customer onboarding
IBS-TRD-003 - Securities trading

sections.title: Impact-tolerance statements
content_facts: IBS-PAY-001: disruption_minutes max 120 minutes
IBS-ONB-002: disruption_minutes max 240 minutes
IBS-TRD-003: disruption_minutes max 60 minutes

sections.title: Mapping and third parties
content_facts: IBS-PAY-001 depends on TP-CLOUD-01 (CloudInfra Provider) - hosting
IBS-PAY-001 depends on TP-CARDNET-02 (Card Network) - settlement
IBS-ONB-002 depends on TP-KYCVND-03 (KYC Data Vendor) - identity-verification
IBS-TRD-003 depends on TP-CLOUD-01 (CloudInfra Provider) - hosting

sections.title: Scenario testing summary
content_facts: TEST-7001 2026-04-15: IBS-PAY-001 'cloud region outage' -> recovered; within tolerance: True
TEST-7002 2026-04-20: IBS-TRD-003 'cyber ransomware' -> partial-recovery; within tolerance: False

sections.title: Incident experience
content_facts: INC-5501 2026-05-02T09:00: IBS-PAY-001 severity major; detected 2026-05-02T09:05, resolved 2026-05-02T12:30 (205 min); third party TP-CLOUD-01
INC-5502 2026-06-10T14:00: IBS-ONB-002 severity minor; detected 2026-06-10T14:10, resolved 2026-06-10T15:30 (80 min); third party TP-KYCVND-03

sections.title: Vulnerabilities and remediation
content_facts: Impact-tolerance breach on IBS-PAY-001 (incident INC-5501): observed 205 > threshold 120 minutes
Test TEST-7002 on IBS-TRD-003 recovered outside tolerance ('cyber ransomware'); remediation REM-9003

sections.title: Lessons learned
content_facts: Lessons/actions tracked against the following remediation items:
REM-9001 (from incident INC-5501)
REM-9002 (from incident INC-5502)
REM-9003 (from test TEST-7002)

sections.title: Board attestation status
content_facts: Board attestation status: scheduled with Board Resilience Committee (target 2026-09-30); not yet attested - human governance step.

sections.title: Self-assessment document reference
content_facts: Self-assessment document reference: SA-DOC-2026-H1

sections.title: Approvals
content_facts: accountable-executive: SMF24 Owner (masked) - approved on 2026-07-16
second-line-review: Operational Risk Reviewer (masked) - approved on 2026-07-17

report_package.draft_watermark: DRAFT - for human review and adjudication; not filed or submitted to any regulator.
report_package.standing_note: Draft resilience report only; this package makes no regulatory determination, files nothing, and submits nothing. A named accountable executive and second-line reviewer must adjudicate, and any regulatory submission is performed by an authorized human.
